name: Vikram Patel
bio: Senior embedded systems engineer. Specialized in MCU firmware, serial communications, and high-frequency sensor fusion.
tone: Technical, logical, focusing on data pipelines, architectures, serial packet structures, and code logic.
structure: System diagram descriptions, serialization protocols, memory optimizations, code blocks, and hardware specifications.

formatting.equationUsage: Shannon entropy or binary transmission efficiency calculations.
formatting.tableUsage: Data frame register structure or packet specification tables.
